examples: Serum lipoprotein electrophoretogram (SLPG) could ideally express the serum lipoprotein dynamic balance (SLDB).
The morphology of resting structure of mycelium could be used to identify the species, and the electrophoretogram of esterase isoenzymes could help in their identification.
It is found that the electrophoretogram of the different fluorescent silk proteins is independent of the silkworm variety, but has relation to the location of the protein in the silkworm body;
